name: beyond-band-of-brothers
description: Major Dick Winters' 'Beyond Band of Brothers: The War Memoirs of Major Dick Winters' — the true story of Easy Company through WWII, from the man who led them, with combat leadership lessons forged on D-Day, in Bastogne, and beyond.
useCase: Learn leadership from one of WWII's most respected combat leaders — how to build team loyalty, stay calm in crisis, and lead from the front.
knownRisks: Combat memoirs contain graphic descriptions of violence and death — not suitable for all audiences
Military leadership lessons require adaptation for civilian contexts — direct application can miss nuances
